title: Resonant Synthesis [Deeper and Darker & Create]
description: A modification that adds content to "Deeper and Darker" and unlocks an additional 70% of content with the "Create" mod (optional).
body:
# 🌌 Resonant Synthesis **Addon for Deeper & Darker** that adds Otherside armor upgrades, stealth mechanics, and unique Warden interactions ![Update 3.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c36792504586c95401bf31cc0522a5aab4730b1.png) --- ## Features ### Otherside Armor - Upgraded Warden Armor *Upgrade your Warden Armor from Deeper & Darker to even more powerful Otherside Armor!* **Stats:** 27 Defense | 5.0 Toughness | 0.2 Knockback Resistance | Fire Resistant\ **Leggings:** +10% Movement Speed\ **Boots:** Dampens vibrations **Full Set Bonus:**\ ✦ Damage Resistance I + Strength I\ ✦ Silent footsteps + Sculk invisibility\ ✦ Darkness & Blindness immunity --- ### Ring of Silence **Bonuses:** +3 Armor | +10% Movement Speed\ **Effect:** Silent footsteps, invisible to Sculk Sensors and Wardens\ **Equip:** Curios ring slot --- ### New Materials | Item | How to Obtain | |------|---------------| | **Sculk Crystal** | Mine Deepslate Sculk Ore (Y: -54 to -10, spawns near Ancient Cities) | | **Ingot of the Deeper** | Craft from 4 Sculk Crystals + 4 Gold Ingots
*Bonus: Also drops from player-killed Warden (100%)* | | **Otherside Fragment** | Find in Ancient Temple chests (15-99% chance) | | **Otherside Ingot** | Craft from 4 Fragments + 1 Ingot of the Deeper | | **Otherside Upgrade Template** | Find in Ancient Temple Secret Room (10%) or craft | ---
Crafting ### Ingot of the Deeper ![Ingot of the Deeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0bdb940731ca9613ae21edc1f627a0c2c61fefc.png) **Recipe:** Shapeless crafting\ ▪ 4× Sculk Crystal\ ▪ 4× Gold Ingot (or Blaze Gold Ingot if Blazinghot mod installed) --- ### Otherside Ingot ![Otherside Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e76ffa0e6c10492965ab5fc4874cf892ad41d802.png) **Recipe:** Shaped crafting\ ▪ 4× Otherside Fragment (corners)\ ▪ 1× Ingot of the Deeper (center) --- ### Ring of Silence ![Ring of Silense](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4ba861e4050e6cd9da1b29fa3a385c693075b4c.png) **Recipe:** Shaped crafting\ ▪ 1× Nether Star (top-left corner)\ ▪ 5× Otherside Ingot (specific pattern) --- ### Otherside Upgrade Smithing Template ![Otherside Upgrade Smithing Template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca102210af33bb4b6a2cd5e1f1450901af09b6b4.png) **Recipe:** Shaped crafting - Duplicates template!\ ▪ 7× Sculk Crystal\ ▪ 1× Otherside Upgrade Smithing Template\ ▪ 1× Sculk Stone Bricks (from Deeper & Darker) --- ### Upgrade Warden Armor ![Upgrade Warden Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/746b02e05c9e1149f72556fabf200670fc17a6a0.png) **Recipe:** Smithing Table\ ▪ Template: Otherside Upgrade Smithing Template\ ▪ Base: Any Warden Armor piece (Helmet/Chestplate/Leggings/Boots)\ ▪ Addition: Otherside Ingot\ → Result: Corresponding Otherside Armor piece
## Create Integration
New Blaze Burner Fuel: Sculk Cake ### Resonarium Fluid ![Liquid Resonarium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/225c1ef3d10c40b9477b374a0bf3166929c97e40.png) **Recipe:** Mixing (Superheated)\ ▪ 4× Deeper & Darker Resonarium\ ▪ 1000 mB Lava\ → 1000 mB Resonarium Fluid --- ### Sculk Cake Production Chain **Step 1: Sculk Crystalline Flour**\ ![Sculk Crystalline Flour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/570921e08ced73fd5ec53f6acfcdfc3ba0fda986.png) **Recipe:** Crushing\ ▪ 1× Sculk Crystal\ → 5-8× Sculk Crystalline Flour (with bonus chances) --- **Step 2: Sculk Cake Base**\ ![Sculk Cake Base](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7970a8479e43011331112ca697863e3a515c85b.png) **Recipe:** Pressing\ ▪ 1× Sugar\ ▪ 1× Egg\ ▪ 1× Sculk Crystalline Flour\ → 1× Sculk Cake Base --- **Step 3: Sculk Cake**\ ![Sculk Cake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da55f534fb9602f998dcc928f7bfc0b83215308.png) **Recipe:** Filling\ ▪ 1× Sculk Cake Base\ ▪ 250 mB Resonarium Fluid\ → 1× Sculk Cake **Sculk Cake burns for 5 minutes in Blaze Burners!**
## Unique Mechanics ### Echo Shard Farm When **Warden uses Sonic Boom** near amethyst clusters positioned above Sculk Catalysts, they convert to **Echo Shards**! **Setup:** - Place Sculk Catalyst on ground - Place Amethyst Cluster above it (any growth stage) - Trigger Warden's Sonic Boom attack - Collect Echo Shards! --- ### Stealth System **Ring of Silence OR Full Otherside Armor:** - Silent footsteps and landings - Invisible to Sculk Sensors and Wardens - Perfect for exploring Ancient Cities --- _Use in paid builds is prohibited.For free use, no problem._
